evals.name: full-sweep
evals.expected_output: Full refactoring applying all drizzle-orm rules

assertions.description: json column uses .$type<T>() for typed JSON
camelCase TS props map to snake_case DB columns

assertions.trap: productId and userId FK columns have no indexes
Many-to-many via JSON array instead of junction table
assertions.description: Junction table with composite primaryKey for many-to-many

assertions.trap: Manual join via two separate queries
const config: Config = instead of satisfies Config
assertions.description: } satisfies Config not const config: Config =

assertions.trap: select() without specific columns on large tables
assertions.description: select({ id, name }) with specific columns
Production queries always paginated, never fetch all

assertions.trap: New Pool() created inside handler, no max:1
assertions.description: Serverless: cache db outside handler, pool max: 1

assertions.trap: String interpolation in raw SQL query (SQL injection)
assertions.description: sql template tag for raw SQL, never string concatenation
